sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16644" key="a)strodw/rhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρο-δώρητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n16644.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">endowed by the stars,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φύσις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:221:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">221.22</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
